nasb.text: And Jesus stopped and called them, and said, “What do you want Me to do for you?”

esv.text: And stopping, Jesus called them and said, “What do you want me to do for you?”

cnv.text: 耶穌就站住，叫他們過來，說：“要我為你們作甚麼呢？”

ccb.text: 耶稣停下脚步，叫了他们来，问他们：“你们要我为你们做什么？”

csbs.text: 耶稣就停住，叫他们过来，说：“你们要我为你们做什么呢？”
